nasb.text: Yet he said to them, “No, but you have come to look at the undefended parts of our land!”

esv.text: He said to them, “No, it is the nakedness of the land that you have come to see.”

cnv.text: 約瑟對他們說：“不是的，你們實在是來偵察本地的虛實。”

ccb.text: 约瑟说：“不对，你们是来探听我们虚实的。”

csbs.text: 约瑟却对他们说：“不，你们实在是为了窥探本地的虚实而来。”
